name: skill-manager
title: Skill Manager
description: Manage skills.md across coding agents, distribute and centralize, and create Raycast snippets
author: ramir_leite

commands.name: list-skills
commands.title: List Skills
commands.description: View, search, and manage your coding skills

commands.name: add-skill
commands.title: Add Skill
commands.description: Add a new skill to your skills.md

commands.name: distribute-skills
commands.title: Distribute Skills
commands.description: Sync skills to coding agent configuration files

commands.name: import-skill-from-github
commands.title: Import Skill from GitHub
commands.description: Import a SKILL.md file from a GitHub repository

commands.name: import-github-repo-as-skill
commands.title: Import GitHub Repo as Skill
commands.description: Transform a GitHub repository into a skill using opensrc

commands.name: sync-skills
commands.title: Sync Skills
commands.description: Sync skills from agent configs to central folder

commands.name: manage-agents
commands.title: Manage Agents
commands.description: View and configure detected coding agents

preferences.name: centralSkillsFolder
preferences.title: Central Skills Folder
preferences.description: Central folder for skill files (source of truth)

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
preferences.description: Optional token for accessing private repositories
